title: Create Content Standards Request
description: Request parameters for creating a new content standards configuration

adcp_major_version.description: The AdCP major version the buyer's payloads conform to. Sellers validate against their supported major_versions and return VERSION_UNSUPPORTED if unsupported. When omitted, the seller assumes its highest supported version.

countries_all.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes. Standards apply in ALL listed countries (AND logic).

channels_any.description: Advertising channels. Standards apply to ANY of the listed channels (OR logic).

languages_any.description: BCP 47 language tags (e.g., 'en', 'de', 'fr'). Standards apply to content in ANY of these languages (OR logic). Content in unlisted languages is not covered by these standards.

registry_policy_ids.description: Registry policy IDs to use as the evaluation basis for this content standard. When provided, the agent resolves policies from the registry and uses their policy text and exemplars as the evaluation criteria. The 'policy' field becomes optional when registry_policy_ids is provided.

policy.description: Natural language policy describing acceptable and unacceptable content contexts. Used by LLMs and human reviewers to make judgments. Optional when registry_policy_ids is provided.

calibration_exemplars.description: Training/test set to calibrate policy interpretation. Use URL references for pages to be fetched and analyzed, or full artifacts for pre-extracted content.

oneOf.description: URL reference - specific page to fetch and evaluate

type.description: Indicates this is a URL reference

value.description: Full URL to a specific page (e.g., 'https://espn.com/nba/story/_/id/12345/lakers-win')

language.description: BCP 47 language tag for content at this URL

oneOf.description: Full artifact with pre-extracted content (text, images, video, audio)
URL reference - specific page to fetch and evaluate

type.description: Indicates this is a URL reference

value.description: Full URL to a specific page (e.g., 'https://news.example.com/controversial-article')

language.description: BCP 47 language tag for content at this URL

oneOf.description: Full artifact with pre-extracted content (text, images, video, audio)

idempotency_key.description: Client-generated unique key for this request. Prevents duplicate content standards creation on retries. MUST be unique per (seller, request) pair to prevent cross-seller correlation. Use a fresh UUID v4 for each request.
